---
title: "Computer Organization and Design: The Hardware and Software Interface"
description: "My notes & review of [Computer Organization and Design: The Hardware and Software Interface](https://www.amazon.com/dp/B08TRLDR2Q?ref_=ppx_hzod_title_dt_b_fed_digi_asin_title_351_0_0) by John L. Hennessy, David A. Patterson"
author: "Tyler Hillery"
date: "2026-05-04"
image: "./cover.jpg"
filters:
    - social-share
share:
    permalink: "https://tylerhillery.com/notes/computer-org-and-design"
    description:
    twitter: true
    facebook: false
    reddit: true
    stumble: false
    tumblr: false
    linkedin: true
    email: true
    mastodon: true
categories: [Technical Books, In Progress]
---

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Notes
